reflection:
yesterday was good in the ways that matter. filip and nasti came over, you played ping pong and wrote 'felt like a different person' after, sushi at sushi mama, anxiety 1 and stress 0. mood ended at 8 in the evening. that is a nice landing for a day that started at 4:51.

which brings me to the thing i want to flag. you woke at 4:51, did 40 cycles of 4-7 breathing, iced your back, and stayed in bed trying to sleep. got_out_of_bed was false. the CBT-i rule from your Vita work is the opposite of what you did. if you are awake more than 20 minutes, you get up. otherwise the bed becomes the place where you lie there feeling that 'tension inside' and waiting for nothing. you literally described it that way. the bed is learning the wrong association.

5.6 hours, recovery 52, hrv 32.7. not a catastrophe, but two short nights this week and skin temp is running warm again. you also flagged the gracilis on the left and the tight outer foot, that is a real compensation pattern off the glute, do not park it before turkey.

speech worry is smaller today, you noticed that yourself. but the caro and A dissonance is sitting on the page. do not let that one stew quietly.

today, when you wake too early, get out of bed. that is the only thing.

go easy.
opener: good day with filip and nasti, but you stayed in bed again at 4:51
focus_for_today: if you wake before 5 again, get out of bed within 20 minutes
